clips.title: The Hangar
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, blockbuster grade. A large aircraft hangar at night. The scene uses a bold teal-and-orange split-lighting look: cool teal light fills the shadows and background while a warm orange key light hits the person from the side, the classic cinematic color contrast. A person in a flight jacket stands in the hangar. Teal shadows, warm orange key, high production grade, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Street
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, blockbuster grade. A rain-slicked city street at night. The scene uses a bold teal-and-orange split-lighting look: cool teal fills the wet background while warm orange streetlight rims the person, cinematic color contrast on the wet asphalt. A person in a leather jacket stands on the street. Teal shadows, warm orange rim, wet reflections, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Bridge
clips.prompt: Sci-Fi style, near-future, blockbuster grade. A spaceship control deck. The scene uses a bold teal-and-orange split-lighting look: cool teal glow from the screens fills the background while a warm orange key hits the person, cinematic contrast. A person in a technical flight suit stands at the console. Teal screen glow, warm orange key, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

A person in a rugged jacket stands among crates. Teal shadows, warm orange key, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Drive
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, blockbuster grade. Inside a car at night, city lights passing. The scene uses a bold teal-and-orange split-lighting look: cool teal light from the windows fills the shadows while warm orange streetlights wash the person's face, cinematic contrast. A person in a jacket sits at the wheel. Teal window glow, warm orange wash, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Rooftop
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, blockbuster grade. A city rooftop at dusk, skyline behind. The scene uses a bold teal-and-orange split-lighting look: cool teal fills the twilight sky and shadows while a warm orange key rims the person, cinematic color contrast. A person in a coat stands at the edge. Teal twilight, warm orange rim, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
